en.Lincoln All Saints, Lincolnshire, Englan: Lincoln All Saints, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom

nameMeanings.name: Amaranth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Celestino, Jose, Luis, Alberto, Ana, Armando, Evelio, Fernando, Gregorio, Jorge, Josefina, Lino.  Italian Antonio, Gaetano, Pasquale, Sal, Sebastiano.

Italian (Campania): from an early Christian female personal name, Greek Amaranthē ‘unfading’, bestowed with reference to the adjective amarantos (conflated with anthos ‘flower’ to give the -anth ending) as used in I Peter 5:4: ‘And when the chief shepherd shall appear, ye shall receive a crown of glory that fadeth not away’.
Portuguese and Galician: habitational name from any of the places so called in northern Portugal and Galicia, from Latin (villa) Amaranti, from the Latin personal name Amarant(h)us (‘amaranth’).

en.lifeSummary: Amaranth Delincoln was born in 1083, in Lincoln All Saints, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom as the daughter of Colswein of Lincoln and Muriel de Chappell. She had at least 3 sons with Walter Fitz Ragemer DeWelles. She died on 3 May 1153, in Willoughby, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 70.

ko.Lincoln All Saints, Lincolnshire, Englan: 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 링코컨 앨 세인츠
ko.lifeSummary: Amaranth Delincoln(은)는 1083년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 링코컨 앨 세인츠에서 Colswein of Lincoln(와)과 Muriel de Chappell의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 Walter Fitz Ragemer DeWelles(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1153년 5월 3일 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 윌루그h비에서 70세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Amaranth Delincoln родилась в 1083 г. в местности линколн алл сеинц, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания. Её родителей звали Colswein of Lincoln и Muriel de Chappell. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына от Walter Fitz Ragemer DeWelles. Она умерла 3 мая 1153 г. в местности уиллоугби, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 70 лет.
